title: AGY-103: Workspace Design & File Security (L100)
author: tridorian Labs & Google Cloud
description: Learn to design secure workspace boundaries and configure file-system level access controls for autonomous AI agents. This course provides comprehensive training on directory locking, POSIX folder permissions, and designing custom SDK policies to shield sensitive user folders (such as SSH keys, desktop, documents) from agent interactions.

features.title: Boundary Containment
features.description: Lock agent execution strictly to designated workspace paths using canonical paths validation.

features.title: POSIX Directory Security
features.description: Enforce standard permissions (chmod/chown) and create low-privilege runtime configurations to block shell escapes.

features.title: Custom Firewalls
features.description: Implement SDK argument predicates to intercept and deny tool requests that target sensitive files.

features.title: Verification Audits
features.description: Use the agy CLI verification tool and mock simulations to audit configuration security before execution.
